3:
Mauci reaches his destination safe and sound thanks to your aid. You approach the Dotharl boy to lend an ear to his woes.

※You must be accompanied by Mauci to complete this task. Speak with her again should you become separated.

You resolve to ensure that Mauci reaches his destination safe and sound, and to there lend the Dotharl boy an ear.

※You must be accompanied by Mauci to complete this task. Speak with him again should you become separated.
